description: Style NoteHitting all the season's fashion notes right, this pair of sandals from catwalk is a closet essential that'll go with all your summer favourites. You can wear this to snazz up a simple look, but don't forget to style them with tonal accessories!Product DetailsTeal upper with cutouts referencing the clog styleHas a padded footbed with a heel patchMini heel with a plastic heel cap (comes with a spare pair of heel caps)TOU outsole with patterned groovesHeel: 2"Material and CareSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
